hero_title: Find Your Dream House By Us
hero_text: We provide the best real estate services to help you find the perfect home. Browse thousands of listings across Egypt.
about_title: The Leading Real Estate Rental Marketplace.
about_text: Over 39,000 people work for us in more than 70 countries all over the world. This breadth of global coverage, combined with specialist services.
about_callout: "We provide the best real estate services in Egypt with exceptional quality and customer satisfaction"
service_buy_text: Over 1 million+ homes for sale available on the website, we can match you with a house you will want to call home.
service_rent_text: Over 1 million+ rental properties available. Find the perfect place that feels like home without the commitment of buying.
service_sell_text: List your property with us and reach thousands of potential buyers. We make selling your home easy and efficient.
cta_text: We can help you realize your dream of a new home
about_value_transparency_desc: We believe in complete transparency in every transaction. No hidden fees, no surprises — just honest real estate services.
about_value_trust_desc: All properties are verified before listing. Your personal data is protected with enterprise-grade encryption.
about_value_expertise_desc: With 15+ years of experience in the Egyptian real estate market, our agents have deep knowledge of every neighborhood.
about_value_client_desc: Your satisfaction is our top priority. We work tirelessly to match you with the perfect property.
timeline_2010_desc: Homeverse was established with a mission to modernize real estate in Egypt.
timeline_2014_desc: Opened our second office and expanded listings to cover the Mediterranean coast.
timeline_2018_desc: Launched our online platform, making property search accessible from anywhere.
timeline_2022_desc: Partnered with leading smart home providers to offer integrated technology solutions.
timeline_2025_desc: Reached 2,500+ happy clients and became the most trusted real estate platform in Egypt.
team_text: Our team of experienced agents is dedicated to helping you find the perfect property.
service_intro: We provide comprehensive real estate services to help you find, buy, sell, or rent your perfect property across Egypt.
service_additional_management_text: Complete property management including tenant screening, rent collection, maintenance coordination, and financial reporting. We handle everything so you can relax.
service_additional_analysis_text: Detailed market analysis reports with price trends, neighborhood comparisons, ROI projections, and investment opportunity assessments for informed decision-making.
service_additional_consultation_text: One-on-one consultations with certified real estate experts. Whether you are a first-time buyer or an experienced investor, we provide tailored advice.
service_process_1_desc: Meet with our expert to discuss your requirements, budget, and preferred locations.
service_process_2_desc: We curate a personalized list of properties matching your criteria from our extensive database.
service_process_3_desc: Schedule and attend property viewings with our agent who provides expert insights.
service_process_4_desc: Our team handles all negotiations to ensure you get the best possible deal.
service_process_5_desc: We manage all legal paperwork, contracts, and compliance requirements.
service_process_6_desc: Final inspection, key handover, and ongoing post-sale support for complete peace of mind.
service_cta_text: Contact us today for a free consultation and let our experts guide you through the process.
